comments: Approved. The contract scope is properly bounded to M3 implementation in src/mcp-server/src/index.ts and explicitly requires exposing the MCP tools cowork_start_task, cowork_read_file, cowork_write_file, cowork_list_directory, and cowork_finish_task. The implementation description correctly constrains behavior to task-scoped worktree/context spoofing via the worktree manager. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids documentation updates assigned to M4 and forbids workflow state semantic changes outside the intended M3 progression. allowed_files includes index.ts and worktree-manager.ts plus task-local artifacts, which is completely consistent with the stated contract boundary.
